campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they discussed staffing vacancies and how the city is working to recruit and retain employees. The council also received public input on various matters and noted that the Boogie Festival is happening this weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Public hearing on government code matters
Boogie Festival happening this weekend

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 20, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council adopted a resolution to identify certain properties in Saratoga and scheduled a public hearing for June 17, 2026, where residents can voice concerns before the city makes a final decision on the matter.
keyTopics: Resolution adopted to identify designated properties
Public hearing scheduled for June 17, 2026
Residents can submit protests and comments before final approval

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 2, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on June 2, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, confirm a new youth commissioner, and set up the November 2026 municipal election for three council seats. The council also approved several administrative and development items, including a new residential tract map, software agreements for permit processing, and budget authorization.
keyTopics: November 3, 2026 general election called for three town council positions
New youth commissioner confirmed by selection committee
Tract 10675 development map approved (Boulevard location)
Five-year software agreement with Accela for permit and planning systems
Building plan check services agreements authorized

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 10, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize and prepare upcoming council agendas for June 16 and June 23, 2026. The council reviewed what items to add to these agendas, scheduled specific times for certain discussions, and checked whether proper notice requirements were met. They also discussed the Community and Economic Development Committee's work plan.
keyTopics: Finalizing the June 16, 2026 council agenda
Planning items for the June 23, 2026 draft agenda
Scheduling specific time slots for agenda items
Community and Economic Development Committee work plan

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 9, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a meeting on June 9, 2026, that included a private session to discuss hiring a new City Attorney, followed by a public session where council members recognized Pride Month and Juneteenth with official proclamations.
keyTopics: City Attorney position—closed session to discuss appointment
Pride Month proclamation
Juneteenth proclamation

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 16, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held two back-to-back meetings on June 16, 2026: a closed session (details not publicly available) followed by a study session focused on a Community Equity Assessment update.
keyTopics: Community Equity Assessment update presented to council
Closed session meeting (specific topics confidential)

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 16, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council held a study session to review how parks and recreational facilities are currently designated and zoned in Cupertino, and to discuss what protections state law requires for these spaces. The meeting also included public comment time for residents to address the Council on matters not on the agenda.
keyTopics: Review of existing park and recreational facility designations
Zoning corrections for parkland sites
State law protections for recreational facilities

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 9, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on June 9, 2026, available both in-person and online via Zoom. Residents can participate remotely and submit written comments before the meeting through the city's online system.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format available (in-person and Zoom)
Remote participation options for residents
Written public comment submission process via eComments

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — June 16, 2026
milpitas.summary: Milpitas City Council met to approve the city's 2026-2027 budget and community development spending plan, greenlit a new residential or commercial development project, and discussed a new program to prevent storefront crime in the city.
keyTopics: 2026-2027 Annual Action Plan and Community Development Block Grant funding approved
New site development and residential/commercial project approved with density permit
Storefront Crime Prevention Program proposed to address retail theft and break-ins
City Council approved meeting minutes and confirmed upcoming meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — June 12, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to shift the community toward electric vehicles and reduce fossil fuel use. The council reviewed design guidelines for a new public EV charging hub grant program and gathered feedback on electrification strategies that could serve as a model for future city policies.
keyTopics: Community-wide electrification strategies and long-term planning
Design guidelines for public EV charging hub grant program
Staff presentation and council feedback on electric vehicle infrastructure
